case_title: KARP, PHILIP vs. MASSETTE, DAVID E. et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE:JOHN ZYLKA/ CLERK: ECLAVERIA/RPTR: DANIELLE ADIBZADEH C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFF PHILIP KARP PRESENT WITH HIS COUNSEL LAURIE HOWELL, AND DEFT DAVID E. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. A PREPREPARED JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED BY THE COURT.
